message:
test(fp-expr): add eval/query expression parity tests (frankenpandas-xmp)

Add 11 new tests verifying DataFrame.eval() and DataFrame.query()
expression string parity with pandas:

- Arithmetic: subtraction, multiplication, division
- Parenthesized: (a + b) * c precedence
- Comparison: >= operator
- Query filters: equality (==), OR compound (x < 2 or x > 7)
- Extension trait: eval(), query(), query_with_locals()

Total fp-expr tests: 45 (34 existing + 11 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
